scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && (cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt)
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app --port 8080
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:no-turbo: npm run kill-ports && npx concurrently "npm run dev:no-turbo --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
